new_translation: Các công nhân bến tàu đang giúp chất các thùng hàng hôm nay.

old_example: All the necessary software programs have already been loaded onto the company laptops for the new employees.
new_example: All the necessary software has been loaded onto the company laptops today.
new_translation: Tất cả phần mềm cần thiết đã được nạp vào máy tính hôm nay.

old_example: The loading of the delivery trucks must be completed by 6 AM to ensure on-time deliveries to retailers.
new_example: The loading of the delivery trucks must be completed by 6 AM.
new_translation: Việc chất hàng lên các xe tải phải hoàn thành trước 6 giờ sáng.

old_example: The small business owner applied for a bank loan to finance the purchase of new manufacturing equipment.
new_example: The business owner applied for a bank loan to buy equipment today.
new_translation: Chủ doanh nghiệp đã nộp đơn xin vay ngân hàng để mua thiết bị.

old_example: The car dealership provided him with a loaner vehicle while his own car was undergoing major engine repairs in the workshop.
new_example: The car dealership provided him with a loaner vehicle today.
new_translation: Đại lý ô tô đã cung cấp cho anh một chiếc xe mượn hôm nay.

old_example: Low-interest loans are available for university students to help cover the cost of tuition and living expenses.
new_example: Low-interest loans are available for university students today.
new_translation: Các khoản vay lãi suất thấp có sẵn cho sinh viên đại học hôm nay.

old_example: Please wait in the hotel lobby while the front desk staff confirms your reservation details.
new_example: Please wait in the hotel lobby today.
new_translation: Vui lòng chờ ở sảnh khách sạn hôm nay.

old_example: The company prefers to source its raw materials from local suppliers to support the community and reduce transportation costs.
new_example: The company prefers to source its raw materials from local suppliers today.
new_translation: Công ty thích lấy nguyên liệu từ nhà cung cấp địa phương hôm nay.

old_example: To expand into the Asian market, the company needs to localize its marketing content to suit different cultural preferences.
new_example: The company needs to localize its marketing content for the Asian market.
new_translation: Công ty cần bản địa hóa nội dung tiếp thị cho thị trường Châu Á.

old_example: The ingredients used in the restaurant's signature dishes are all grown locally on organic farms.
new_example: The ingredients used in the restaurant are all grown locally today.
new_translation: Các nguyên liệu được sử dụng trong nhà hàng đều được trồng tại đây.

old_example: The new tourist attraction has provided many job opportunities for the locals in the rural community.
new_example: The new attraction has provided many job opportunities for the locals today.
new_translation: Điểm thu hút mới đã cung cấp nhiều cơ hội việc làm hôm nay.

old_example: The hotel is conveniently located near the central train station and several major shopping malls.
new_example: The hotel is conveniently located near the train station today.
new_translation: Khách sạn nằm ở vị trí thuận tiện gần nhà ga hôm nay.

old_example: Locating a suitable site for the new factory is the top priority for the board of directors this quarter.
new_example: Locating a suitable site for the new factory is the top priority.
new_translation: Việc xác định địa điểm phù hợp cho nhà máy là ưu tiên hàng đầu.

old_example: The company's new office location offers a breathtaking view of the harbor and easy access to public transport.
new_example: The company's new office location offers a breathtaking view today.
new_translation: Vị trí văn phòng mới của công ty mang lại tầm nhìn tuyệt đẹp.

old_example: The coffee shop chain plans to open five more locations across the downtown area by the end of the year.
new_example: The coffee shop chain plans to open five more locations today.
new_translation: Chuỗi cửa hàng cà phê lập kế hoạch mở thêm năm địa điểm nữa.

old_example: Don't forget to lock the filing cabinet before you leave the office for the weekend.
new_example: Don't forget to lock the filing cabinet before you leave today.
new_translation: Đừng quên khóa tủ đựng hồ sơ trước khi bạn rời đi hôm nay.

old_example: Employees can store their personal belongings in the locker room provided by the company.
new_example: Employees can store their personal belongings in the locker room today.
new_translation: Nhân viên có thể cất đồ đạc cá nhân trong phòng để đồ hôm nay.

old_example: If you are dissatisfied with the service, you can lodge a formal complaint with our customer relations department.
new_example: You can lodge a formal complaint with our customer relations department today.
new_translation: Bạn có thể đưa ra một khiếu nại chính thức hôm nay.

old_example: The ambitious young politician set lofty goals for his first term in office, including a complete overhaul of the national healthcare system.
new_example: The ambitious politician set lofty goals for his first term today.
new_translation: Chính trị gia đầy tham vọng đã đặt ra những mục tiêu cao cả.

old_example: The security guard is required to log all visitors entering the building after business hours.
new_example: The guard is required to log all visitors entering the building today.
new_translation: Nhân viên bảo vệ được yêu cầu ghi nhật ký tất cả khách vào.

old_example: Logan International Airport in Boston is one of the busiest travel hubs on the East Coast of the United States.
new_example: Logan International Airport is one of the busiest travel hubs today.
new_translation: Sân bay Quốc tế Logan là một trong những trung tâm bận rộn nhất.

old_example: The captain recorded the ship's position, speed, and weather conditions in the logbook every four hours throughout the voyage.
new_example: The captain recorded the ship's position in the logbook every four hours.
new_translation: Thuyền trưởng đã ghi lại vị trí con tàu vào sổ nhật ký.

old_example: As a skilled logician, she was able to identify the flaws in her opponent's argument quickly and effectively.
new_example: As a skilled logician, she identified the flaws in the argument today.
new_translation: Là một nhà logic học, cô ấy đã xác định các lỗ hổng lập luận.

old_example: Organizing a large international conference involves many logistical challenges, from travel arrangements to venue booking.
new_example: Organizing a large conference involves many logistical challenges today.
new_translation: Tổ chức một hội nghị lớn liên quan đến nhiều thách thức hậu cần.

old_example: We need to hire a company specialized in logistics to handle the distribution of our products worldwide.
new_example: We need to hire a company specialized in logistics today.
new_translation: Chúng tôi cần thuê một công ty chuyên về hậu cần hôm nay.

old_example: The logistics manager is responsible for coordinating the delivery of goods to all regional retail outlets.
new_example: The logistics manager is responsible for coordinating the delivery of goods today.
new_translation: Quản lý hậu cần chịu trách nhiệm điều phối việc giao hàng.

old_example: The company decided to update its logo to better reflect its modern values and innovative technology.
new_example: The company decided to update its logo to reflect its values today.
new_translation: Công ty đã quyết định cập nhật logo của mình hôm nay.

old_example: The marketing materials feature the logos of all the sponsors who contributed to the charity event.
new_example: The marketing materials feature the logos of all the sponsors today.
new_translation: Các tài liệu tiếp thị có biểu trưng của các nhà tài trợ.

old_example: The IT system automatically logs all user activities to ensure data integrity and security.
new_example: The IT system automatically logs all user activities today.
new_translation: Hệ thống CNTT tự động ghi nhật ký mọi hoạt động của người dùng.

old_example: London is a global financial center and is home to the headquarters of many multinational corporations.
new_example: London is a global financial center and home to many corporations today.
new_translation: Luân Đôn là một trung tâm tài chính toàn cầu hôm nay.
